channel.title: Observability on INFINI Pizza
channel.description: Recent content in Observability on INFINI Pizza

item.title: Cluster health
item.description: Cluster health # Returns the cluster health for quick overview. Get the cluster health # Requests # GET /_cluster/health

item.title: Cluster state
item.description: Cluster state # Returns an internal representation of the cluster state for debugging or diagnostic purposes. Get the whole cluster state # Requests # GET /_cluster/state Get the state of a specific region # Requests # GET /_cluster/_region/{region_id}/state Path parameters # region_id (Required, String) The UUID of the region you want to query. A special ID _local can be specified to query the state of the region that handles this request.
